3060430.name: RustNaut
3060430.description:
Navigate the world of RustNauts, uncover formidable bosses, and fight your way through a desolate wasteland.

After a crash landing on an alien planet, your body is severely damaged. To save your life, the onboard AI transforms you into a cyborg. Manage your power, expand your abilities, and uncover the story of RustNaut as you seek the truth behind this mysterious, rust-covered world.
3060430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
